title: 10 Herbal Essential Oils For Baldness
description: Avena sativa essential oils contains a rich mixture of active constituents like ferulic acid, avenanthramides, and avenacosides. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing irritation and inflammation that can contribute to baldness. The avenanthramides also have antioxidant properties, which protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals and promote healthy hair growth.
